name_en: YSL Straw Kate 99, the front flap features YSL lettering and tassel accessories, paired with a replaceable chain strap and an adjustable leather strap. The shoulder strap can also be removed to use as a clutch, making it suitable for evening parties! The double-strap design comes with a leather long strap and a chain, allowing for free swapping. Wearing the short chain makes it a trendy underarm bag!
name_cn:
YSL Straw Kate 99, the front flap features YSL lettering and tassel accessories, paired with a replaceable chain strap and an adjustable leather strap. The shoulder strap can also be removed to use as a clutch, making it suitable for evening parties! The double-strap design comes with a leather long strap and a chain, allowing for free swapping. Wearing the short chain makes it a trendy underarm bag!
Model: 604276
Size: 26*13.5*4.5cm
